qoq_changes: Cash and cash equivalents increased from $14.16 billion to $16.22 billion
Merchandise inventories increased from $18.12 billion to $21.14 billion
Accounts payable increased from $19.78 billion to $23.51 billion
new_risks: No new risks were explicitly disclosed in the provided financial statement excerpt
management_tone: Bullish; the company demonstrated strong top-line growth, double-digit net income expansion, and robust cash generation.
analyst_note: Costco delivered a strong Q1 FY26 with total revenue growing 8.3% YoY to $67.3 billion and net income up 11.3% YoY, driven by solid membership fee growth (+14% YoY). The significant build in inventory and accounts payable reflects typical seasonal preparation, while the cash position remains highly robust at $16.2 billion.
